assertions.assertion: Client has multiple Secret entries in the ClientSecrets collection (both old and new)
assertions.rationale: Lines 38-48 define two Secret entries in ClientSecrets — one labeled 'Original secret' and one 'New secret'.

assertions.assertion: Explains that IdentityServer validates against all configured secrets so both old and new work during rollover
assertions.rationale: Line 62 states 'IdentityServer validates against all configured secrets in the ClientSecrets collection. Any matching secret will successfully authenticate the client.'

assertions.assertion: Recommends removing the old secret after clients have migrated to the new one
assertions.rationale: Line 72 states 'Remove the old secret from the ClientSecrets collection' as step 4 of the rollover process.
